title: Artemis II crew tear up over idea of naming moon crater after astronaut’s late wife - thebanner.com
description: Artemis II crew tear up over idea of naming moon crater after astronaut’s late wife  thebanner.comArtemis II Astronauts Name Moon Crater After Carroll, Reid Wiseman’s Late Wife  The New York TimesMoon memorial: Artemis 2 astronauts name lunar 'bright spot' after mission commander's late wife  SpaceThe Artemis II astronauts requested that an unnamed crater on the moon be dedicated to Carroll Wiseman, the wife of mission commander Reid Wiseman, who died of cancer in 2020 at age 46.
